title: PATCH /api/projects/[id] endpoint for project settings
summary: Created a PATCH endpoint at /api/projects/[id] to allow authenticated users to update project settings, specifically the changelogBranch field.
business_context: Projects need to be able to specify which branch their changelog should sync from. Previously, there was no way to update project settings via the API. This endpoint closes that gap.
affected_users: All authenticated project members with edit permissions
acceptance_criteria: PATCH request to /api/projects/[id] with changelogBranch in body
Endpoint validates that changelogBranch is non-empty string
Authentication via NextAuth session or Bearer token (API key)
Returns updated project object with id and changelogBranch
